{{Quote|So this is Felacat, huh? Looks like these poor guys have taken a real beating…|Ahsoka Tano|<ref name="The Feral Queen">{{TCWComicCite|6.21|The Feral Queen}}</ref>}}
'''Felacat''' was the [[Felacatian]] homeworld. It was located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], and its inhabitants were cat people who would transform into tiger-like creatures when in [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] for too long. [[21 BBY/Legends|During]] the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] laid [[Siege of Felacat|siege]] to Felacat.

{{Planet-stub}}
